name: Anchovy Yogurt Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
2. Refrigerate for about 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt as needed before serving.
4. Makes approximately 3/4 cup, enough for 12 servings (about 1 tablespoon per person).
